description: Search for or read a FHIR ServiceRequest resource (orders and referrals for procedures, diagnostics, therapies). For direct read, provide _id alone. For search, provide patient, subject, identifier, encounter, requester, based-on, or requisition. Use code to identify the service ordered and intent/status to filter.

searchParams._id: ServiceRequest resource ID — performs direct read when provided alone
searchParams.based-on: What request fulfills (CarePlan, MedicationRequest, or ServiceRequest reference)
searchParams.body-site: Where procedure is going to be done (coded body site)
searchParams.code: What is being requested/ordered (SNOMED CT, LOINC)
searchParams.encounter: Encounter in which this request was made
searchParams.intent: Intent: proposal, plan, directive, order, original-order, reflex-order, filler-order, instance-order, option
searchParams.status: Status: draft, active, on-hold, revoked, completed, entered-in-error, unknown
searchParams.subject: Subject of the request (Patient, Group, Location, or Device)
searchParams.supporting-info: Additional clinical information supporting the request
